name: H&g Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 24cm springform tin and cover the base with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Mix cocoa powder and boiling water in a separate bowl until cool.
3. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Sift flour and baking soda into another bowl.
6. Gradually stir the sifted dry ingredients into the creamed mixture, then add milk and vanilla extract. Mix until just combined.
7. Gently fold in the cooled cocoa powder mixture.
8. Pour batter into prepared tin and bake for 50-60 minutes.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes. Run a knife around the edge of the tin to loosen it, then carefully release the sides.
10. Turn cake onto a wire rack and remove the base and paper. Cool completely.
11. Prepare chocolate ganache by melting dark chocolate with cream over low heat. Allow to cool slightly before pouring over the cake and smoothing with a flat-bladed knife. Avoid handling the cake for too long, then let it set.
